title: ProcessingCompletedPayload
description: Payload for PROCESSING_COMPLETED (eventVersion 1). Stub-only in Phase 3 (note carried a fixed stub marker, no frameCount/processingDurationMs). Phase 4 (PRD-Phase-4 REQ-4.10) makes note describe real frame iteration and adds the optional fields below with real values; still no detection results (Phase 5). Additive per ADR-005 — no eventVersion bump.

note.description: Human-readable summary, e.g. "Phase 4: real frame iteration complete, no detection model yet" (Phase 3's stub note is no longer produced once REQ-4.10 is wired in).

frameCount.description: Number of frames actually decoded during iteration (REQ-4.2/4.10) — the real, verified count, as opposed to ProcessingStartedPayload.frameCount's container-reported estimate.

processingDurationMs.description: Wall-clock milliseconds spent iterating frames (REQ-4.8), excluding the MinIO download.
